allow: Bash(./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pip install lightgbm xgboost optuna shap)

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\Hp\\Documents\\trading_lab"; Write-Output "--- gh ---"; try { gh --version } catch { "gh not found" }; Write-Output "--- git ---"; git --version; Write-Output "--- dashboard remote ---"; git -C dashboard remote -v; Write-Output "--- dashboard status \(short\) ---"; git -C dashboard status --short | Select-Object -First 10; Write-Output "--- dashboard log ---"; git -C dashboard log --oneline -5; Write-Output "--- .env exists ---"; Test-Path .env; Write-Output "--- data dir size ---"; "{0:N2} MB" -f \(\(Get-ChildItem -Recurse data | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum / 1MB\); Write-Output "--- existing gitignores ---"; Get-ChildItem -Filter ".gitignore" -Recurse -Depth 1 -Force | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\Hp\\Documents\\trading_lab"; Get-ChildItem data | Select-Object Name, @{N='SizeMB';E={if\($_.PSIsContainer\){"{0:N1}" -f \(\(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1MB\)}else{"{0:N2}" -f \($_.Length/1MB\)}}})
